title: Cascade, Anchor, OKLCH, Expand & Toast
description: Five 2026 CSS features: sibling-index() stagger, anchor positioning, OKLCH relative colors, interpolate-size expand, @starting-style toasts.

drops.title: sibling-index() Stagger Cascade
drops.description: Pure CSS staggered animations using the new sibling-index() function — no JavaScript delay loops needed.
drops.concept: CSS sibling-index() returns an element's 1-based position among its siblings, enabling auto-calculated animation-delay values without any JavaScript. Three demos show cards, letters, and progress bars all cascading in with pure CSS stagger.
drops.source: CSS Functions Level 5 spec / MDN sibling-index()

drops.title: CSS Anchor Positioning
drops.description: Floating labels and tooltips that auto-reposition using CSS anchor-name and position-area — zero JavaScript.
drops.concept: CSS Anchor Positioning lets any element tether to another via anchor-name + position-anchor. Combined with position-try-fallbacks, popovers automatically flip when they would overflow the viewport — all in pure CSS with no JavaScript.

interaction.mouse: Hover buttons to see anchored tooltips

drops.title: OKLCH Relative Color Palette
drops.description: One brand color generates a full 12-swatch design system palette using oklch() relative syntax and color-mix().
drops.concept: OKLCH's perceptually uniform color space means adjusting lightness or chroma looks predictable across all hues. CSS relative color syntax — oklch(from var(--brand) calc(l + .15) c h) — derives tints, shades, saturated variants, and complements without Sass or PostCSS.
drops.source: CSS Color Level 5 spec / Chrome relative color syntax

drops.title: interpolate-size Smooth Expand
drops.description: Pure CSS height:auto transitions finally work with interpolate-size:allow-keywords — no JS height tricks needed.
drops.concept: Historically, animating to height:auto required JavaScript to compute the target height. CSS interpolate-size:allow-keywords tells the browser to interpolate between a numeric value and auto, enabling smooth native expand/collapse on any element with variable content.

drops.title: @starting-style Toast Notifications
drops.description: Toast notifications with smooth enter/exit using @starting-style for entry and allow-discrete for exit — no JS class toggling.
drops.concept: @starting-style defines the style an element transitions FROM when first inserted into the DOM. Combined with transition:display allow-discrete, elements can animate both enter and exit cleanly. No JS animation class toggling, no requestAnimationFrame hacks.

interaction.click: Trigger different toast types (success, warning, error, info, custom)
